name: UniCat
description: 888 fully on-chain pixel cats on Ethereum. ERC-20 + NFT collection + NFT-staking miner. Each token renders a unique 24x24 pixel cat directly from contract bytecode, derived from a personal seed bound to the holder's wallet. No IPFS, no off-chain assets. Mint costs are paid in UNICAT and burned permanently. Stake the NFT to mine more UNICAT.
